name: POOL CORP
summary: General Pool Corporation (the Company , which may also be referred to as we, us or our ), a member of the S&P 500 Index, is the worlds largest wholesale distributor of swimming pool supplies, equipment and related leisure products and is one of the leading distributors of irrigation and landscape maintenance products in the United States. As of December 31, 2025, we operated 456 sales centers strategically located in North America, Europe and Australia, from which we sell swimming pool supplies,...
